displayNameZh: 做出一个通用型的客服机器人
summary: Yt Generic Chatbot component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的做出一个通用型的客服机器人组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-generic-chatbot/src/YtGenericChatbot.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtGenericChatbot` and `ytGenericChatbotDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Generic Chatbot Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-generic-chatbot to my project. Preserve the exported YtGenericChatbotProps API and register the YtGenericChatbot composition with the default props.
